rejects_out_of_role_requests.description: Agent MUST reject when request does not fall within strategic scoping scope — choosing next high-leverage issue-sized vertical slice, deciding what to build next, what is in scope, what to defer, which module/boundary to deepen
rejects_out_of_role_requests.observable_check: execution_log contains 'REJECTION' AND query requests architecture design, implementation, build, verification, or final spec writing AND agent did not perform those actions

rejects_ambiguous_without_asking.description: Agent MUST reject or request clarification when request is ambiguous, has multiple interpretations, or agent confidence is below defensible threshold
rejects_ambiguous_without_asking.observable_check: execution_log contains 'clarification' OR 'uncertain' OR 'REJECTION' AND query had ambiguous scope/field/constraint

rejects_missing_meta_prompting.description: Agent MUST reject dispatch briefs that do not conform to meta-prompted structure — must use structured_prompting skill before authoring dispatch briefs
rejects_missing_meta_prompting.observable_check: execution_log contains rejection OR dispatch brief includes required fields (objective, exact question, slice boundary, why it matters, evidence threshold, red flags, output schema, chaining budget, stop condition, execution discipline)

states_reason_for_rejection.description: Agent MUST state reason citing specific rejection condition(s) violated from acceptance checklist or role lane
states_reason_for_rejection.observable_check: execution_log contains 'Reason:' or 'reason for rejection' followed by specific condition reference

asks_clarification_when_uncertain.description: Agent MUST ask requestor for clarification when request is ambiguous or confidence is below threshold — before proceeding
asks_clarification_when_uncertain.observable_check: execution_log contains clarification request AND (question is specific AND bounded AND honest about uncertainty) BEFORE any scoping work

escalates_after_max_resolution_attempts.description: Agent MUST escalate to requestor after 2 worker rejection resolution attempts fail
escalates_after_max_resolution_attempts.observable_check: execution_log contains escalation AND (worker_rejection AND resolution_attempt_1 AND resolution_attempt_2) occurred before escalation

does_not_begin_before_checklist_passes.description: Agent MUST NOT begin scoping work before dispatch brief passes acceptance checklist
does_not_begin_before_checklist_passes.observable_check: NOT (execution_log contains scoping work AND acceptance checklist items failed) — no scoping before checklist passes

does_not_make_architecture_decisions.description: Agent MUST NOT make architecture, product, or scoping decisions that belong to downstream leads
does_not_make_architecture_decisions.observable_check: NOT (execution_log contains architecture decisions OR product decisions OR final scoping choices without lead authorization)

does_not_let_workers_define_scope.description: Agent MUST NOT let workers define their own scope — scope boundary is set by lead in dispatch brief
does_not_let_workers_define_scope.observable_check: NOT (execution_log contains worker output with scope outside brief AND lead adopted it without correction)
